steps.title: Close the interrupting phrase
steps.content: The phrase ratified in 1804 interrupts the main sentence between the subject, the 12th amendment, and the verb, separated. The opening comma before ratified needs a matching comma after the year.

steps.title: Reject mismatched punctuation
steps.content: Choice B uses an em dash to close a phrase opened by a comma. Choice C leaves the interrupting phrase unclosed. Choice D uses a colon, which introduces information rather than closing an interrupter. The comma after the year completes the punctuation pair. The answer is A.
